ModMetaData.name: RimWorld Observability
ModMetaData.author: CryptikLemur
ModMetaData.description:
Local performance telemetry framework for RimWorld players and mod authors.
Records timed sections, counters, gauges, histograms, GC events, and allocation samples from the game and ships them to a local collector daemon. The collector exposes a dashboard, exportable diagnostic bundles, and an optional Prometheus endpoint.
This mod ships the framework library plus the collector binary. Other mods that want to instrument their own code can depend on this mod and use the library API.
For full documentation, visit the project page.
